name: feature-loop-codex
description: Codex-native feature development loop on top of acceptance-gate: brainstorm, design, contract, evals, plan, execute, deduped and variance-aware verification, baseline checks, judgment panels, review, decision cards, evidence pages, signoff, and handoff without Claude Code workflow scripts.

interface.shortDescription: Codex-native feature loop with acceptance gates
interface.longDescription: Use Feature Loop Codex to guide a feature from idea through design, acceptance contract, evals, implementation, deduped and variance-aware machine verification, baseline checks, judgment panels, adversarial review, decision cards, evidence pages, evidence-backed human signoff, and handoff using Codex-native orchestration instead of Claude Code workflow scripts.
defaultPrompt: Run feature-loop-codex for this feature request.
Resume feature-loop-codex for this acceptance slug.
